# CaedoAi

> CaedoAi is a web development studio specializing in custom websites and digital marketing solutions for home service businesses. We build high-converting websites for HVAC, Plumbing, Electric, and Roofing companies with SEO optimization, lead generation, and ongoing support included.

## What we do

- **Custom website development** — full-stack websites built for local service businesses, optimized for lead generation
- **Local SEO & AEO** — search engine optimization and AI-powered search optimization to increase visibility
- **Lead capture & management** — integrated contact forms, CRM setup, and lead tracking systems
- **Content management** — blog posts, service pages, and content strategy tailored to home service verticals
- **Mobile optimization** — responsive design ensuring perfect display on all devices
- **Analytics & reporting** — monthly performance reports and conversion tracking

## How we work

- Transparent pricing with no hidden fees — monthly retainers tailored to your business size
- Dedicated support — direct access to your development team
- Unlimited revisions — iterative approach until you're satisfied
- Fast turnaround — websites delivered within 2-4 weeks
- Long-term partnership — we scale with your business

## Packages

- [Starter / Growth / Scale tiers](https://www.caedoai.com/packages) — custom pricing based on business needs

## Portfolio

- [Our Work](https://www.caedoai.com/work) — case studies and live examples of HVAC, Plumbing, Electric, and Roofing sites

## Ideal clients

- HVAC contractors and companies
- Plumbing services
- Electrical contractors
- Roofing companies
- Multi-service home maintenance businesses
